raw_consumer_statement: I sent a letter via US mail on or about XX/XX/2023 to the following mailing address : American Express Customer Service XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, TX XXXX This was a request to open a dispute for a transaction with XXXX made on XXXX XXXXn the amount of {$270.00} I submitted this dispute within 30 days of the transaction. I request that the full amount be credited back to my account and that all the interest charges accumulated over the time be credited as well.
